title: Driver Teams — Team Management UI
description: Add a team management panel to the dispatcher board assign view. Dispatcher can create teams for the selected date, add drivers to teams, and delete teams. Teams are shown alongside individual driver columns.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Team button opens a modal with team name input and driver multi-select
Drivers already in a team for the selected date are marked as unavailable in the picker
Created teams appear as columns in the assign view alongside individual driver columns
Team column header shows team name and member driver names
Delete button on team column removes the team after confirmation
Teams are fetched from GET /api/teams?date= on date change
implementationNotes: Team columns use the same DriverColumn component with a isTeam prop to adjust header rendering
Driver multi-select uses native <select multiple> — no external library
Droppable id for team columns is the team id string
Do not modify the schedule (weekly) view in this task
Reuse existing modal CSS pattern for the create team modal
